# StoryVista | 文景

StoryVista turns a UTF-8 story source into evidence-aware JSON, semantic visual assets, and a static interactive Story Atlas.

Primary command:

python scripts/storyvista.py build skill/examples/minimal-novel-demo/input.txt --out output/minimal-novel-demo

Required outputs:

- source-index.json
- chunks.json
- story-atlas.json
- visual-asset-plan.json
- image-manifest.json
- assets/placeholders/*.svg
- atlas.html
- verification-report.md

Implemented in v0.2:

- standard-library CLI
- conservative directive-based extraction
- characters, locations, organizations, objects, concepts, relations, events, and timeline
- source evidence and uncertainty states
- Reader Mode and Actor Mode prototype
- Cinematic Bible HTML atlas
- semantic SVG placeholders
- image provider detection and fallback interface
- validation and tests

Planned, not implemented as complete runtime features:

- generalized LLM/NLP extraction adapter
- external image-generation adapters
- advanced graph layout and 3D maps
- Writer, Director, and Worldbuilder mode implementations
- API server and full framework adapter runtimes

Canonical files:

- README.md
- README.zh-CN.md
- AGENTS.md
- skill/SKILL.md
- skill/references/core-pipeline.md
- skill/references/data-contracts.md
- skill/references/fallback-rules.md
- skill/references/verification.md
- skill/references/image-provider.md
- skill/templates/
- skill/examples/minimal-novel-demo/
- docs/upgrade-report-v0.2.md

Rules:

- Do not fabricate evidence or story facts.
- Missing image providers never block the build.
- Bind visuals through image-manifest.json.
- Initials-only avatars are disabled by default.
- Adapter documents are not proof of adapter runtime.
- Users remain responsible for source and image rights.
